## Checklist

- [ ] Added / updated tests
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes locally (if Rust changed)
- [ ] `uv run ruff check && uv run mypy python/fundcloud` clean
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry under **[Unreleased]**
